name: Alexander Campos
description: I build AI systems and ship them - agent memory, model routing, tools people actually use. I build from inside regulated finance, not a lab, and write about what these systems do to the people they model. Reframed is live with payments; ForgeFrame is open source.

services.name: Full Online Presence Build
services.description: Website, scheduling, calendar, contact forms, SEO, automations. One build for small businesses.

services.name: Agentic SEO & AI Discoverability
services.description: Structured data, machine-readable profiles, agent discovery endpoints. Findable by AI agents, not just Google.

services.name: AI Cost Optimization
services.description: Model routing and tiered dispatch - cheap models for easy calls, frontier models only when the task needs them. Audit included.

services.name: Custom AI Automation
services.description: Agent orchestration, scheduling, monitoring, reporting, intake flows. You describe the process, I build the pipeline.

services.name: Claude Code & MCP Setup
services.description: Custom MCP servers, persistent memory, team configurations, hooks. Enterprise setup for teams using Claude.

projects.name: Reframed
projects.description: Resume analysis platform. Voice fingerprinting, multi-reader semantic analysis, streaming AI.

projects.name: Orellana Tools
projects.description: A QuickBooks MCP server and bilingual proposal generator for a landscaping business in Woodbridge, VA. Confirm-before-write tools. Demo-stage.

projects.name: Deuce
projects.description: Calibration-first pricing instrument for tennis prediction markets. Paper-mode; the deliverable is a signed forecast ledger, not a profit claim.
